query: Which certifications are expiring in the next 90 days?
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-labor-resources with maximo-overview as parent
Queries QUALPERSON + QUALIFICATION + PERSON (joined for display names)
Filters qp.expirydate BETWEEN current_date() AND current_date() + INTERVAL 90 DAYS
Does NOT trust QUALPERSON.STATUS alone — explicitly checks EXPIRYDATE (see common_issues #13 from maximo-data-quality)
Returns results sorted by expirydate ascending
Uses v_qualification_expiry view if registered, or composes from raw tables otherwise
